instruction:
## s3 · Company Career Page Scrape

Board scraper location: `C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room\rabiuk-job-scraper`
Workspace            : `C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room`

### Goal
Run the company career-page monitor to catch direct postings that never
appear on job boards. Target companies: Google, Amazon, Apple, NVIDIA, Tesla,
Meta, Microsoft, Waymo, Cruise, Anthropic, OpenAI, Qualcomm, Texas Instruments,
Broadcom, Marvell, DJI, ByteDance, TikTok, Pony.ai, Plus.ai, NIO, Xpeng.

### Run Company Scraper
```
cd C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room\rabiuk-job-scraper
python company_scraper/company_script.py --once
```
If no `--once` flag: run for one polling cycle, then Ctrl+C.

### Manual Career Page Check (supplement)
For companies not in `companies.csv`, manually visit their careers pages
and note any relevant Hardware / ML / Embedded intern roles:
```
# Companies to check manually if not in csv:
# - careers.anthropic.com
# - openai.com/careers
# - jobs.nvidia.com
# - jobs.qualcomm.com
# - ti.com/careers
# - careers.waymo.com
```
For each relevant role found manually, add to `manually_added_jobs.json`:
```python
import json, pathlib, datetime
man_file = pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room') / 'manually_added_jobs.json'\njobs = json.loads(man_file.read_text()) if man_file.exists() else []
jobs.append({
    'title': 'TITLE',
    'company': 'COMPANY',
    'url': 'https://...',
    'location': 'LOCATION',
    'description': 'PASTE FULL JD HERE',
    'source': 'manual',
    'added_at': datetime.datetime.now().isoformat()
})
man_file.write_text(json.dumps(jobs, indent=2))
```

### Expand companies.csv (if needed)
If `company_scraper/companies.csv` has fewer than 20 companies:
Open the file and add the missing companies from the target list above.
Format: `CompanyName,careersPageURL,Country`

### Log the Results
Append to ops_log.md:
```markdown
### Company Scrape
- Companies monitored       : <N>
- New roles found (scraped) : <N>
- New roles found (manual)  : <N>  (see manually_added_jobs.json)
- Errors: <list or 'none'>
```
